title: AirPods Pro 3 vs AirPods 4: Which Should You Buy in 2026?
excerpt: AirPods Pro 3 or AirPods 4? We break down every difference so you can decide which Apple earbuds are worth your money.
author: CompareElite Team

faq.q: Is AirPods Pro worth the $70 premium over AirPods 4?
faq.a: If you use ANC daily (commuting, open offices, flights), the Pro's superior noise cancellation and ear tips make it worth it. For casual home use, AirPods 4 is enough.

faq.q: Do AirPods 4 have active noise cancellation?
faq.a: Yes — Apple added ANC to the AirPods 4 (ANC model). The standard AirPods 4 model does not include ANC.

faq.q: Which is better for the gym?
faq.a: AirPods Pro wins here — the ear tips create a secure seal that stays in during intense workouts. AirPods 4 can slip out for some users.
